form.formComment: Last start won by 2 m (FT Fr2) at Marburg (2:47.70) beating Edward Jay in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $12. Sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start won by 2 m (FT Fr2) at Marburg (2:47.70) beating Edward Jay in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $12. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Last start was fifth behind Splashndash at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5 at $34. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr7) over 2138m at this track beaten a neck by Sports Bounty (2:34.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $34. Well placed and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait as the start was effected, losing valuable ground.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr1) over 1660m at this track beaten 25 m by Tough Shaz (1:56.10) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on April 4 at $71. The run prior 8th (Fr5) over 1780m after racing wide at Redcliffe beaten 22 m by Merry Jewel (2:08.30) in 3yo+ NR 46 to 53 on March 26 at $8. Deserves another chance from the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened rounding the first turn, resulting in a marker being struck.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1780m at Redcliffe beaten 17 m by Punters Jewel (2:08.10) in 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on April 2 at $23. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 2138m at this track, beaten 6 m by Brian Christopher (2:35.90) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on March 27 at $19. Not keen this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the early stages of the home straight.
Utilised the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Checked and raced roughly around the 1400m.

form.formComment: He was impressive winning two starts back [-+] saluting by 2.75 m (Sr2) at Redcliffe (2:10.70) beating Illbewatching in 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $6.50. Sure to be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the early stages of the straight.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 2.25 m by Splashndash (2:15.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5 at $7.50. Decent effort last start. Heading the right way and is a leading player.

formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 2.25 m by Splashndash (2:15.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5 at $7.50. Decent effort last start. Heading the right way and is a leading player.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Her previous first-up run was successful when she won by a head (Fr2) at this track (2:00.30) beating Taking A Punt in NR 41 to 46 on July 11 at $31. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. Her previous first-up run was successful when she won by a head (Fr2) at this track (2:00.30) beating Taking A Punt in NR 41 to 46 on July 11 at $31. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the early stages of the home straight.
Caught wide early then restrained to the rear of the field.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Marburg and this track. Last start posted a big 9 m win as favourite (Fr4) at Marburg (2:16.80) beating Twosipsally in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $1.50. Will go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the home straight and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd (Sr3) over 2280m at Redcliffe beaten 7 m by Rocktime (2:50.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 8 at $61. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr5) over 1660m at this track, beaten 19 m by Hell Of A Hand (1:57.40) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on February 3 at $126. Prefer others on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failing to maintain position until the start.

form.formComment: Two back was fourth behind Miss Froufrou at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind The Harris Hawk at Marburg over 2200m in a 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $4.80. Forward performance expected.
